Author: anfroholic
Content:
Next revision of the wafer holder/ tape stretcher. 
I've thought a bit about the up vs. down stretch. 

They each have their own quirks
I will call this one **up**(the second image in your set), there is not a lot of room around the pusher part and homing the machine is potentially problematic. 

Pushing **down** I can't quite figure a good way to 
a) load a frame
b) have the desired strength without becomming too bulky

Also both have issues with fitting motion components around, but I think those can be dealt with

Author: anfroholic
Content: I will print off a few pieces tonight and see how I feel in the morning.
